description: An IT auditor reviews the governance process for developing and deploying artificial intelligence (AI) models.

nodes.task_description: Review the company's AI ethics policy.

expected_outcome.value: The auditor confirms that a policy exists to guide the ethical development of AI.

nodes.task_description: For a new AI model used for credit scoring, review the documentation to see how the model was tested for bias against protected groups.

expected_outcome.value: The auditor finds that the documentation for bias testing is weak and lacks statistical rigor.

nodes.task_description: Verify that there is a process for monitoring the AI model's performance in production to detect drift or degradation over time.

expected_outcome.value: The auditor confirms that a model monitoring process is in place.
